_comment: INFORMATIONAL ONLY. ~/.snowflake/cortex/permissions.json is a runtime grant cache, not a policy file, so the setup skill does NOT write to it. This file documents the recommended safe posture for a new non-technical user, which the skill verifies and explains.

recommended_posture.why: The assistant asks before each tool call, edit, or SQL run. Nothing happens without an explicit Approve.
recommended_posture.plan_mode: Encourage Plan Mode for unfamiliar tasks — it is read-only and shows the plan before anything runs.
recommended_posture.do_not: Do not enable Bypass Approvals for a new non-technical user; reserve it for isolated, trusted environments.
